name: Steak Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure out 1/3 cup of ketchup.
2. Add 3 tablespoons of orange juice to the ketchup.
3. Stir in 1 tablespoon of soy sauce.
4. Mix in 1 tablespoon of vinegar.
5. Incorporate 1 tablespoon of dark molasses.
6. Finally, add 1 tablespoon of Worcestershire sauce.
7. Transfer the mixture to a covered container and store it in the refrigerator until ready to use.
8. Serve the sauce spooned over steaks or hamburgers.
Keep for months and months.
